title: Experimental Elytra Nerf
description: Simple mod that brings back the elytra changes from 1.18 experimental snapshot 7
body:
# 1.18exp7 Elytra Nerf Fabric mod that reverts elytra functionality to like it was in [1.18 experimental snapshot 7](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.18_experimental_snapshot_7).
**Requires Fabric API.** ### Changes - Firework rocket boosting is 1/6th slower - Elytras no longer lose durability from gliding - Elytras only lose durability when when rockets are used
### Gamerules - `elytraFireworkDurability` Durability points subtracted when a rocket is used `default:3`
- `elytraGlideDurabilityRate` Seconds spent gliding to decrease durability by one `default:0`
report bugs or incompatibilities [here](https://github.com/sonopsa/experimental-elytra-nerf/issues).
